info.name: Image Converter & Compressor
info.summary: Convert any raster image to JPEG and compress it toward a target size.
info.description:
Right-click images in the Files app to convert them to JPEG. By default the plugin targets ~1 MB per output file by resizing and tuning JPEG quality; an "options" menu lets you set custom dimensions and quality instead. Supports JPEG, PNG, WebP, GIF, BMP, TIFF, HEIC/HEIF, and AVIF sources.
Requires ImageMagick with the relevant delegates and the PHP Imagick extension enabled.
info.author: major-mayer
